{{Infobox character
| name = Cormac
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| titles = Traveler of Endross, Endross Traveler, legally appointed representative of Damasca
| abilities = hand-held thunderstorm, summon a lightning-based serpent, manipulate a storm to create thorned vines with blue sparks
| affiliations = service to Overlord Malachi
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

''See also: [[Cormac Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Cormac is a [[Traveler]] of [[Endross]] who serves [[Overlord Malachi]]. Hailing from a brutal desert wasteland characterized by extreme weather and dangerous predators, he possesses terrifying powers, including the ability to manifest a thunderstorm within his hand. He is described as having poisonous green eyes and a gleaming head. Cormac has demonstrated significant durability, such as surviving being thrown a great distance. He is characterized by his volatility and capacity for violence; he was responsible for the death of [[Simon's mother]] and harbors a deep hatred for [[Damasca]]. Although he has been described as insane, he also functioned as the legally appointed representative of [[Damasca]] during certain events.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Cormac is a lean, hairless [[Traveler]] of [[Endross]] who serves [[Overlord Malachi]] as his only [[Endross]]. Clad in a purple shirt and a brown hooded cloak, he possesses pale skin and luminous, poisonous green eyes. In combat, he wields a hand-held thunderstorm in his right hand, which allows him to summon lightning-based serpents and manipulate storms to create thorned vines crackling with blue sparks. His armor is inscribed with the name of [[Endross]], and he has used a Gate to stow prisoners. Throughout his service, Cormac victimized [[Orlina]] and killed [[Simon's mother]] while collecting a sacrifice.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Cormac]] is a [[Traveler]] of [[Endross]] in service to [[Overlord Malachi]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c3">''House of Blades'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Cormac]] is a lean man in a hooded cloak with a brown cloak and purple shirt.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Cormac]] is hairless, has pale skin, and luminous green eyes.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Cormac]] is a [[Traveler]] of [[Endross]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4">''House of Blades'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Cormac]] has poisonous green eyes.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Cormac]] uses a hand-held thunderstorm as a weapon.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Cormac]]'s armor has [[Endross]] worked into it.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Cormac]] is a [[Traveler]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Cormac]] wields a thunderstorm in his right hand.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Cormac]] can summon a lightning-based serpent from his storm.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Cormac]] can manipulate a storm to create thorned vines with blue sparks.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Cormac]] stowed the prisoners in a Gate.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Cormac]] was [[Malachi]]'s only [[Endross]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13">''House of Blades'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Cormac]] is a person who victimized [[Orlina]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14">''House of Blades'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Cormac]] killed [[Simon's mother]] during the collection of the sacrifice.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c23">''House of Blades'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Cormac]] is an [[Endross Traveler]] who killed [[Simon's mother]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c5">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Leah]] was captured by the [[Endross Traveler]], [[Cormac]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Cormac]] was an unstable [[Endross Traveler]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c13">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Cormac]] was the legally appointed representative of [[Damasca]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c13" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|“I am Cormac, a Traveler of Endross in service to Overlord Malachi.”<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Endross]]
[[Category:Travelers]]
